name: LIQTECH INTERNATIONAL INC
business: LiqTech International, Inc. is a clean technology company that provides gas and liquid purification products by manufacturing ceramic silicon carbide filters and membranes. The company also develops automated filtration solutions and systems. Its products are used in industrial wastewater, oil & gas, commercial pool, marine, and chemical/petrochemical applications.

exposures.sentence: LiqTech has developed, manufactured, and sold innovative silicon carbide ceramic membranes for liquids purification.
We offer diesel particulate filters for exhaust emission control solutions to the verified retrofit and original equipment manufacturer (OEM) markets.
Our systems can be used for the filtration of produced water, which is a byproduct of oil & gas production.
We have developed a special water treatment solution for this new application [exhaust gas recirculation in dual-fuel engines].
Our Aqua Solution ceramic membranes provide unique advantages for the commercial pool filtration industry.
LiqTech provides highly flexible and innovative plastics manufacturing, focusing on machining, welding, bending, and solvent cementing.

catalysts.event: Received supplier approval for water treatment system for WinGD Dual-Fuel Engine
catalysts.sentence: On February 20, 2025, LiqTech received supplier approval water treatment system for the WinGD Dual-Fuel Engine.

catalysts.event: Expanded distribution coverage in Irish swimming pool water filtration system market
catalysts.sentence: On March 11, 2025, LiqTech expanded distribution coverage in the Irish swimming pool water filtration system market.

catalysts.event: Signed distribution and partnership agreement with NAF Aquatics for U.S. commercial swimming pool market
catalysts.sentence: On May 13, 2025, LiqTech International Signed distribution and Partnership Agreement with NAF Aquatics for U.S. commercial swimming pool market.

catalysts.event: Selected by North Star BlueScope Steel for oily wastewater filtration
catalysts.sentence: On June 25, 2025, LiqTech' s Advanced Oily Wastewater Filtration was selected by North Star BlueScope Steel.

catalysts.event: Expanded U.S. presence with Texas service center to support produced water and industrial filtration solutions
catalysts.sentence: On September 15, 2025, LiqTech expanded its U.S. presence with Texas service center to support produced water and industrial filtration solutions.

catalysts.event: Broke ground on marine-focused R&D test center and localization facility in China and completes regional spare parts warehouse
catalysts.sentence: On November 20, 2025, Jitri LiqTech broke ground on marine-focused R&D Test Center and Localization Facility in China and completes regional spare parts warehouse.

tamClaims.claim: LiqTech's addressable market is approximately $6 billion in the filtration technology segment.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the recent GWI publication combined with our inhouse evaluation, the global industry and municipal wastewater equipment market is approximately $300 billion, where filtration technology serves today a $14 billion market. LiqTech silicon carbon membrane technology is outstanding in the places where water is difficult to treat, while water purity is critical for industrial processes. LiqTech has an addressable market of approximately $6 billion.

tamClaims.claim: The global industrial water & wastewater treatment market is projected to reach $7.7 billion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on industry research, the total addressable market within the global industrial water & wastewater treatment market is projected to reach $7.7 billion by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: The produced water treatment market will reach $16 billion in 2032 from $8 billion in 2023, with an 8% CAGR.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Zion Market Research, the market will grow with a CAGR of 8% and reach a market size of $16 billion in 2032 from $8 billion in 2023.

tamClaims.claim: The European commercial pool market is projected to reach $687 million by 2028, growing at 6.1% CAGR.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Frost & Sullivan's report European Swimming Pool Water Treatment Growth Opportunities (June 2022), the European commercial pool market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.1% from 2024 to 2028, reaching a total addressable market of $687 million.
